summary: Missing fixtures/artifacts.json file blocks execution. Workflow env variable template expressions (${{ github.event.inputs.x || 'default' }}) may not evaluate correctly for non-dispatch triggers (push/pull_request/schedule have no inputs context). Test-Harness.ps1 has repetition: 4x near-identical -replace calls (lines ~104-107) could loop. No Set-StrictMode in module. Otherwise, architecture is clean, error handling solid, PowerShell conventions good. Not shippable as-is; fixture file and trigger logic must be fixed.
